titles.title: I've Got So much To Thank Him

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I look around and see the good things That He's done for me Well I know that I'm unworthy of them all But His blessings, He freely give I owe My whole life to Him I've got so much to thank Him for

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Well I've got so much To thank Him for So much to praise Him for you see God has been so good to me And when I think of what He's done And where that He has brought me from I've got so much to thank Him for

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Well sometimes a long life's way I kneel and I stop and say "Thank you Lord" For all you've done for me Oh but someday, When I reach heaven's Shore Lord please Just let me kneel once more I've got so much to thank him for

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I wanna thank Him for letting me see this last day End-time mystery and I know That my name is on the book For the seals they have been revealed any day now That body change we could feel I've got so much to thank Him for
